humidity:60+Math.random()*30,// 60-90% humidity
description:['sunny','partly cloudy','cloudy','light rain'][Math.floor(Math.random()*4)],windSpeed:5+Math.random()*15,// 5-20 km/h

if(weather.temperature>32){recommendations.push({type:'cooling',priority:'high',title:'High Temperature Alert',description:"At ".concat(weather.temperature.toFixed(1),"\xB0C, use AC efficiently. async getEnergyInsights(){let city=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'Panaji';const weather=await this.getCurrentWeather(city);const recommendations=this.generateEnergyRecommendations(weather);const aiTips=await this.generateAIEnergyTips(weather);const summary=this.generateWeatherSummary(weather,recommendations);return{weather,recommendations,summary,aiTips};}generateWeatherSummary(weather,recommendations){const highPriorityCount=recommendations.filter(r=>r.priority==='high').length;const tempStatus=weather.temperature>32?'very hot':weather.temperature>28?'hot':weather.temperature>24?'warm':'cool';let summary="Today's weather in ".concat(weather.location," is ").concat(tempStatus," at ").concat(weather.temperature.toFixed(1),"\xB0C with ").concat(weather.description,". ");if(highPriorityCount>0){summary+="We found ".concat(highPriorityCount," high-priority energy saving opportunities for you today. ");}if(weather.temperature>30){summary+="High temperatures mean increased cooling costs - follow our AC optimization tips to save energy. ";}if(weather.description.includes('sunny')){summary+="Take advantage of natural lighting to reduce electricity usage. ";}return summary;}// Format weather data for display
formatWeatherDisplay(weather){return"".concat(weather.temperature.toFixed(1),"\xB0C, ").concat(weather.description,", ").concat(weather.humidity.toFixed(0),"% humidity");}}export const weatherService=new WeatherService();
